note: C-26 SBOM + AI-BOM for the SERVED site. The runtime dependency set is exactly five pinned CDN scripts, each integrity-verified by SRI at load by the browser (a de-facto verify-at-load admission that fails closed: a tampered byte fails the hash and the script does not execute). verify/tests/61-provenance asserts this BOM matches verify/golden/pinned-deps.json and the integrity hashes in index.html. AI-BOM: the served product ships ZERO AI components (no model, no dataset, no adapter, no vector store) — runtime_ai_components is empty by construction, guarded by verify/tests/62-security-surface. RESIDUAL (honest): GitHub Pages has no deploy-time admission controller, so 'verified at deploy by a fail-closed policy' is discharged at LOAD (SRI) + BUILD (the gate), not at a deploy admission hook; a CI-artifact deploy is the buildable upgrade. | v2.1: vendors self-hosted under ./vendor/ (no unpkg); @babel/standalone removed (compiled-ahead, esbuild-in-CI).
bom_format: CycloneDX-like (minimal, self-contained; no npm dep in the served site)
ai_bom_note: No model, dataset, embedding, adapter, fine-tune, agent or tool ships in the served product. The AI in this repository is the DEVELOPMENT authorship (single vendor, Anthropic), governed by the constitution + gate — recorded in governance/provenance-manifest.json, not shipped to the browser.
